tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: All parameters are within normal limits except for mildly low blood glucose (65.1 mg/dL), which may indicate risk of hypoglycemia and should be clinically correlated. Lipid profile, renal function, electrolytes, and HbA1c are unremarkable. No evidence of proteinuria. Overall, results are stable with only mild hypoglycemia to monitor.

display.value: Neuropathy due to type 2 diabetes mellitus

tr.td: Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
